2603.26542.title: The Multi-AMR Buffer Storage, Retrieval, and Reshuffling Problem: Exact and Heuristic Approaches
2603.26542.paper_summary: Buffer zones are essential in production systems to decouple sequential processes. In dense floor storage environments, such as space-constrained brownfield facilities, manual operation is increasingly challenged by severe labor shortages and rising operational costs. Automating these zones requires solving the Buffer Storage, Retrieval, and Reshuffling Problem (BSRRP). While previous work has addressed scenarios where the focus is limited to reshuffling and retrieving a fixed set of items, real-world manufacturing necessitates an adaptive approach that also incorporates arriving unit loads. This paper introduces the Multi-AMR BSRRP, coordinating a robot fleet to manage concurrent reshuffling, alongside time-windowed storage and retrieval tasks, within a shared floor area. We formulate a Binary Integer Programming (IP) model to obtain exact solutions for benchmarking purposes. As the problem is NP-hard, rendering exact methods computationally intractable for industrial scales, we propose a hierarchical heuristic. This approach decomposes the problem into an A* search for task-level sequence planning of unit load placements, and a Constraint Programming (CP) approach for multi-robot coordination and scheduling. Experiments demonstrate orders-of-magnitude computation time reductions compared to the exact formulation. These results confirm the heuristic's viability as responsive control logic for high-density production environments.
2603.26542.paper_summary_zh: 緩衝區在生產系統中至關重要，以解耦連續過程。<lb/>在密集的地面存儲環境中，例如空間受限的棕地設施，手動操作越來越受到嚴重勞動力短缺和上升的運營成本的挑戰。<lb/>自動化這些區域需要解決緩衝存儲、檢索和重新排列問題（BSRRP）。<lb/>雖然之前的研究已經處理了專注於重新排列和檢索固定項目集的情況，但現實世界的製造需要一種適應性的方法，還要考慮到到達的單位負載。<lb/>本文介紹了多機器人自動化緩衝存儲、檢索和重新排列問題（Multi-AMR BSRRP），協調機器人艦隊來管理同時的重新排列，以及在共享地面區域內的時間窗口存儲和檢索任務。<lb/>我們制定了一個二進制整數規劃（IP）模型，以獲得準確的解決方案以作為基準。<lb/>由於該問題是NP困難的，導致精確方法在工業規模上計算上不可行，我們提出了一種分層啟發式方法。<lb/>這種方法將問題分解為A*搜索，用於單位負載放置的任務級序列規劃，以及約束編程（CP）方法，用於多機器人的協調和調度。<lb/>實驗顯示，與精確公式相比，計算時間減少了數個量級。<lb/>這些結果證實了該啟發式方法作為高密度生產環境的響應控制邏輯的可行性。
2603.26542.author: Max Disselnmeyer et.al.
2603.26542.authors: Max Disselnmeyer, Thomas Bömer, Laura Dörr, Bastian Amberg, Anne Meyer
